name: MongoDB Setup

on:
  [push]
  # pull_request:
  #   branches: 
  #     - main

jobs:
  start-mongo:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    name: job that starts mongo server and imports test data 
    steps:
      - name: checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - name: start mongo in docker container 
        uses: supercharge/mongodb-github-action@1.12.1

      - name: install mongodb database tools 
        run: |
          wget https://fastdl.mongodb.org/tools/db/mongodb-database-tools-ubuntu2404-x86_64-100.15.0.deb
          sudo apt install ./mongodb-database-tools-ubuntu2404-x86_64-100.15.0.deb

      - name: mongoimport testing data 
        run: mongoimport --collection="devProjectQueue" --jsonArray testing_seed.json
